title: arrhenatherum cycladum
intro: Arrhenatherum elatius, also known as Arrhenatherum cylindricum or Arrhenatherum cycladum, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family, Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum cycladum include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical treatment.
